articles.title: Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. Announces 2025 Financial Results and Provides Corporate Update
articles.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. ('Rakovina” or the 'Company”) (TSX-V: RKV) (FSE: 7J0), a biopharmaceutical company advancing next-generation cancer therapies through artificial intelligence (AI)-powered drug discovery, today announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, and provided a corporate update.

articles.title: Apple's Strategic Shifts Amidst Supply Constraints Highlight Tech Sector Resilience
articles.description: Apple's fiscal second-quarter results surpassed Wall Street estimates, driven by new products and strategic leadership shifts, despite supply chain challenges impacting iPhone sales. The introduction of the MacBook Neo and strategic AI partnerships underline Apple's resilient adaptation in the competitive tech landscape.
articles.content: Apple reported fiscal second-quarter results surpassing Wall Street expectations, despite supply chain challenges restraining iPhone sales. Revenues reached $111.18 billion, translating to $2.01 per share, exceeding estimates emphasized by new leader... [679 chars]
